{{CargoOrgan
|name=Excised Sternum
|type=Common
|rank=red
|id=10919
|idx=130
|description=This ribcage belonged to a genious isekai protagonist, its engraved runes enabling ludicrous evolution speed. Until a jealous little brother performed some... unauthorized surgery.
|skill=
|hp=1870
|def=367
|atk=277
|rush=239
|gene1=Wind DMG +120
|gene2=In explorations, {race} ATK +100
|gene3=In explorations, {race} RUSH +100
|gene4=In explorations, CRIT +20%
|gene5=Break RES +4%
|gene6=Earth DMG +120
|gene7=Break RES +4% (Awakened)
|}}
